dataset: Wikipedia List of countries and dependencies by population

pi_items.source: Web search confirmed URL exists and contains country population data
Wikipedia page contains 193 UN member states plus 2 observer states plus dependent territories, well exceeding 50 rows requirement

pi_items.verified_value: All 19 countries are among the world's most populous nations: India (1st), China (2nd), United States (3rd), Indonesia (4th), Pakistan (5th), Nigeria (top 10), Brazil (top 10), Bangladesh (top 10), Russia (top 10), Mexico (top 10), Japan (top 15), Ethiopia (top 15), Philippines (top 15), Egypt (top 15), Vietnam (top 15), Democratic Republic of Congo (top 15), Turkey (top 15), Iran (top 15), Germany (top 15). All are verified to appear on the Wikipedia list.

privileged_info_summary: The task sources data from a real Wikipedia page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_countries_and_dependencies_by_population) containing verified population figures for countries and dependencies. The Wikipedia page includes 193 UN member states, 2 observer states, and numerous dependent territories, providing ample data to extract 50+ rows as required. All 19 validation countries listed (China, India, United States, Indonesia, Pakistan, Nigeria, Brazil, Bangladesh, Russia, Mexico, Japan, Ethiopia, Philippines, Egypt, Vietnam, Congo, Turkey, Iran, Germany) are confirmed to be among the world's most populous nations and appear on the Wikipedia page. The data is real, from an authoritative public source, not synthetic.
